section.title: Data Sources
section.description: Connect data sources to the AI agent: SQL databases, MongoDB, Redis and network shares (SMB/SFTP/WebDAV). Connection strings are encrypted and never exposed in plain text. Each source can be queried via its dedicated tool.

empty.title: No data sources
empty.hint: Connect a SQL database to let the agent query it

security.title: Security & privacy
security.encryption: Connection strings are encrypted with AES-256 and are never returned in plain text.
security.queryOnDemand: The DB is queried only on explicit request by the agent — never in the background.
security.sharedAccess: Shared sources are accessible to all users but can only be modified by the owner.

modal.unsavedSchemaConfirm: You have unsaved schema changes (hidden tables/columns, comments, relations). Closing will discard them. Close anyway?

form.descriptionPlaceholder: E.g.: "Company management database. Contains customers, orders, items, suppliers and stock movements."
form.connectionStringNewPlaceholder: Connection string in the selected engine's format
form.connectionStringSavedNote: The connection string is already saved. Enter a new value only to update it.
form.schemaHintsHint: — free text injected before building the query
form.schemaHintsPlaceholder:
Business rules, conventions or free instructions. E.g.:
- FLAGSTORICO = 1 → historicized record (exclude with WHERE FLAGSTORICO = 0)
- always filter customers with ATTIVO = 1
- amounts are in cents
form.schemaHintsNote: Free-text notes/instructions only. The schema (tables, columns, relations) is managed below with Introspect.
form.prefetchRelationsHint: Reads FOREIGN KEY constraints from INFORMATION_SCHEMA and passes them to the LLM. Requires FK declarations in the DB.
form.enrichedSchemaHint: — tables, comments, relations and denied tables
form.enrichedSchemaSaveFirst: Save the data source first to introspect the schema and generate it with AI.
form.securityNote: The connection string is encrypted with AES-256 before saving and cannot be retrieved in plain text via the interface.

manifest.noSchemaHint: to read tables from the database, then
manifest.noSchemaHint2: for comments and relations. Everything remains editable below.
manifest.denyBlock: Deny: hide from agent and block queries
manifest.denyColumnBlock: Deny field: hide from agent and block it in queries
manifest.clearTooltip: Empty the curated schema: SQL tools will read the live schema from the DB again
manifest.clearConfirm: Clear all introspection for this data source? The curated schema (comments, relations, hidden fields) will be removed and SQL tools will fall back to live.
manifest.modelTooltip: Model used for comment and relation generation

browse.title: Choose a folder
browse.useNeedsConn: Enter the connection string to use this folder
